Container.Name: executor
Container.Overview: Unofficial Unraid template for Executor, a self-hosted integration layer for AI agents.
Container.Description:
Executor lets AI agents call OpenAPI, MCP, GraphQL, and custom JavaScript functions from a self-hosted server.
This template uses the official Executor self-host Docker image.
Unraid-specific notes: - Persistent app data is mapped to /data. - Set EXECUTOR_WEB_BASE_URL when using a reverse proxy, domain, or TLS.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Persistent app data. Executor stores its database and generated keys here. Back this folder up.

Config.Name: Public Base URL
Config.Description: Exact public URL users open, for example https://executor.example.com or http://192.168.1.10:4788. Set this when using a reverse proxy, domain, or TLS.

Config.Name: Allow Local Network
Config.Description: Allow sandboxed code to reach loopback or private network addresses. Leave false unless you need agents to call local LAN services.
